description.value: Aura moderate transmutation; CL 9th; Weight â; Slot none; Price 8,000 gp DESCRIPTION This whistle is shaped like a wolf’s head and is crafted out of silver. Once per day the bearer may blow the whistle to cause one lycanthrope within 30 feet to make a DC 17 Will save or be forced back into its humanoid form for the next 24 hours. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, baleful polymorph; Cost 4,000 gp
